scripts.deploy: npm run build && aws s3 sync dist/ s3://$(aws cloudformation describe-stacks --stack-name ApplyticStack --query "Stacks[0].Outputs[?OutputKey=='ResumeBucketName'].OutputValue" --output text | sed 's/resumes/frontend/') --delete && aws cloudfront create-invalidation --distribution-id $(aws cloudformation describe-stacks --stack-name ApplyticStack --query "Stacks[0].Outputs[?OutputKey=='FrontendUrl'].OutputValue" --output text) --paths '/*'
